# EnvironmentProvider

A utility component that wraps Chakra UI's `EnvironmentProvider` to provide a custom document/window environment context for portals and other DOM operations that need access to a specific document context (e.g., iframes, shadow DOM).

## Import

```jsx
import { EnvironmentProvider } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `value` | `{ document: Document, window: Window }` | - | The environment context to provide (document and window references). |

## Usage

### Basic Environment Provider

```jsx
<EnvironmentProvider value={{ document: iframeDoc, window: iframeWindow }}>
  <App />
</EnvironmentProvider>
```

### Iframe Environment

```jsx
function IframeContent({ iframeRef }) {
  const iframeDoc = iframeRef.current?.contentDocument;
  const iframeWin = iframeRef.current?.contentWindow;

  return (
    <EnvironmentProvider value={{ document: iframeDoc, window: iframeWin }}>
      <PortaledContent />
    </EnvironmentProvider>
  );
}
```
